title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Aptech - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Aptech - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
